evals.prompt: pnpm deploy fails with ERR_PNPM_NOTHING_TO_DEPLOY in our SwiftPM macOS monorepo. We have scripts/deploy.sh. What should the root package.json script be?
evals.expected_output: Use pnpm run deploy or pnpm --filter; avoid bare pnpm deploy; wire to bash scripts/deploy.sh or turbo deploy depending on repo.

evals.prompt: Add turbo.json so deploy always runs after build for the desktop package and is not cached.
evals.expected_output: dependsOn build, cache false for deploy task.
